ALREADY_PARTICIPATING_IN_UNFINISHED_TOUR: You are already participating in another unfinished tournament
ALREADY_OWNS_UNFINISHED_TOURNAMENT: You already own an unfinished tournament
USER_ALREADY_IN_ACTIVE_TOURNAMENT: You are already participating in an active tournament
PRIVATE_JOIN_REQUIRES_INVITE_TOKEN: Invite token is required to join a private tournament
CANNOT_JOIN_FINISHED_TOURNAMENT: You cannot join a finished tournament
ONLY_OWNER_CAN_START_TOURNAMENT: Only the tournament owner can start the tournament
ONLY_OWNER_CAN_CANCEL_TOURNAMENT: Only the tournament owner can cancel the tournament
CANNOT_CANCEL_NON_DRAFT_TOURNAMENT: Only draft tournaments can be cancelled
NOT_ENOUGH_PARTICIPANTS_TO_START: At least 4 participants are required to start the tournament
OWNER_CANNOT_LEAVE_TOURNAMENT: Tournament owner cannot leave the tournament
CANNOT_LEAVE_ACTIVE_TOURNAMENT: You cannot leave a tournament after it has started
CANNOT_SUBMIT_OUTSIDE_SUBMISSION_PHASE: Submissions are only allowed during the submission phase
CANNOT_VOTE_OUTSIDE_VOTING_PHASE: Votes are only allowed during the voting phase
NO_ACTIVE_VOTING_SUBMISSION: There is no active submission for voting
VOTE_TARGET_IS_NOT_CURRENT_SUBMISSION: You can vote only for the currently revealed submission
CANNOT_VOTE_FOR_OWN_SUBMISSION: You cannot vote for your own submission
INVALID_ROUNDS_COUNT: Tournament can have at most 4 rounds
ONLY_PARTICIPANTS_CAN_VIEW_FULL_STATE: Only tournament participants can view the full tournament state
NO_AVAILABLE_ROUND_PROMPTS: No available round prompts left for this tournament
